target:
It's really raining now…
The forecast was wrong, Hizuru?

Forecast, prediction, warning, assumption, plan, foresight…
Since the beginning of history, nothing with 'yo' has ever been reliable.
Ah… I have a bad feeling.
I hope my intuition is wrong.

Since tomorrow's the festival,
I need it to be sunny.

Who knows…
Right now, it's not like that.

No way!
I don't even have a yukata!

What's that, no need to worry!
I'll lend you mine and help you dress!
There's something that would suit Mio.

Please, Mio!!
Will you come with me tomorrow??

Soaking wet~!!
Let me take shelter here!!

Hey? Are you kids from this island?
High school students?
This is Inspector Miyaura from Wakayama North Station~.

Do you know Kobayakawa-san from Koba Mart?
I'd like to talk to you a bit~.
